referencedTypes.description: Extended UI class overrides for the navigation menu component.

members.name: items
members.description: Items rendered by the component.

members.name: modelValue
members.description: The controlled value of the menu item to activate. Can be used as `v-model`.

members.name: defaultValue
members.description:
The value of the menu item that should be active when initially rendered.

Use when you do not need to control the value state.

members.name: dir
members.description:
The reading direction of the combobox when applicable.

If omitted, inherits globally from `ConfigProvider` or assumes LTR (left-to-right) reading mode.

members.name: orientation
members.description: The orientation of the menu.

members.name: delayDuration
members.description: The duration from when the pointer enters the trigger until the tooltip gets opened.

members.name: skipDelayDuration
members.description: How much time a user has to enter another trigger without incurring a delay again.

members.name: disableClickTrigger
members.description: If `true`, menu cannot be open by click on trigger

members.name: disableHoverTrigger
members.description: If `true`, menu cannot be open by hover on trigger

members.name: disablePointerLeaveClose
members.description: If `true`, menu will not close during pointer leave event

members.name: unmountOnHide
members.description: When `true`, the element will be unmounted on closed state.

members.description: Props forwarded to the trigger element.

members.name: active
members.description: Used to identify the link as the currently active page.

members.name: replace
members.description: Calls `router.replace` instead of `router.push`.

members.name: disabled
members.description: When `true`, the link is disabled.

members.name: asChild
members.description: Change the default rendered element for the one passed as a child, merging their props and behavior.

members.name: as
members.description: The element or component this component should render as. Can be overwrite by `asChild`

members.name: to
members.description: Route Location the link should navigate to when clicked on.

members.name: href
members.description: The URL the link should navigate to when clicked on.

members.name: activeClass
members.description: Class to apply when the link is active

members.name: exactActiveClass
members.description: Class to apply when the link is exact active

members.name: inactiveClass
members.description: The class to apply to the link when it is inactive.

members.name: prefetchedClass
members.description: A class to apply to links that have been prefetched.

members.name: external
members.description: Forces the link to be considered as external (true) or internal (false). This is helpful to handle edge-cases

members.name: ariaCurrentValue
members.description: Value passed to the attribute `aria-current` when the link is exact active.

members.name: viewTransition
members.description: Pass the returned promise of `router.push()` to `document.startViewTransition()` if supported.

members.name: target
members.description: Where to display the linked URL, as the name for a browsing context.

members.name: rel
members.description: A rel attribute value to apply on the link. Defaults to "noopener noreferrer" for external links.

members.name: noRel
members.description: If set to true, no rel attribute will be added to the link

members.name: prefetch
members.description: When enabled will prefetch middleware, layouts and payloads of links in the viewport.

members.name: prefetchOn
members.description: Allows controlling when to prefetch links. By default, prefetch is triggered only on visibility.

members.name: noPrefetch
members.description: Escape hatch to disable `prefetch` attribute.

members.name: trailingSlash
members.description:
An option to either add or remove trailing slashes in the `href` for this specific link.
Overrides the global `trailingSlash` option if provided.

members.name: contentProps
members.description: Props forwarded to the content element.

referencedTypes.name: NavigationMenuContentProps
referencedTypes.description: Props for the navigation menu content component.

members.name: disableOutsidePointerEvents
members.description:
When `true`, hover/focus/click interactions will be disabled on elements outside the `DismissableLayer`. Users will
need to click twice on outside elements to interact with them: once to close the `DismissableLayer`, and again to
trigger the element.

callables.name: escapeKeyDown

referencedTypes.name: KeyboardEvent
referencedTypes.description:
**`KeyboardEvent`** objects describe a user interaction with the keyboard; each event describes a single interaction between the user and a key (or combination of a key with modifier keys) on the keyboard. The event type (keydown, keypress, or keyup) identifies what kind of keyboard activity occurred.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/KeyboardEvent)

callables.name: pointerDownOutside
callables.description: Event handler called when a `pointerdown` event happens outside of the `DismissableLayer`. Can be prevented.

callables.name: focusOutside
callables.description: Event handler called when the focus moves outside of the `DismissableLayer`. Can be prevented.

callables.name: interactOutside
callables.description:
Event handler called when an interaction happens outside the `DismissableLayer`. Specifically, when a `pointerdown`
event happens outside or focus moves outside of it. Can be prevented.

callables.description: Emitted when select occurs.

referencedTypes.name: NavigationMenuLinkProps
referencedTypes.resolvedType: { active?: boolean; replace?: boolean; disabled?: boolean; asChild?: boolean; as?: AsTag | Component; to?: string | import("vue-router").RouteLocationAsRelativeGeneric | import("vue-router").RouteLocationAsPathGeneric; href?: string; activeClass?: string; exactActiveClass?: string; inactiveClass?: string; prefetchedClass?: string; external?: boolean; ariaCurrentValue?: 'true' | 'false' | 'page' | 'step' | 'location' | 'date' | 'time'; viewTransition?: boolean; target?: '_blank' | '_parent' | '_self' | '_top' | (string & {}) | null; rel?: (string & {}) | 'noopener' | 'noreferrer' | 'nofollow' | 'sponsored' | 'ugc' | null; noRel?: boolean; prefetch?: boolean; prefetchOn?: 'visibility' | 'interaction' | Partial<{ visibility: boolean; interaction: boolean; }>; noPrefetch?: boolean; trailingSlash?: 'append' | 'remove' }
referencedTypes.description: Props for the navigation menu link component.

members.name: active
members.description: Used to identify the link as the currently active page.

members.name: replace
members.description: Calls `router.replace` instead of `router.push`.

members.name: disabled
members.description: When `true`, the link is disabled.

members.name: asChild
members.description: Change the default rendered element for the one passed as a child, merging their props and behavior.

members.name: as
members.description: The element or component this component should render as. Can be overwrite by `asChild`

members.name: to
members.description: Route Location the link should navigate to when clicked on.

members.name: href
members.description: The URL the link should navigate to when clicked on.

members.name: activeClass
members.description: Class to apply when the link is active

members.name: exactActiveClass
members.description: Class to apply when the link is exact active

members.name: inactiveClass
members.description: The class to apply to the link when it is inactive.

members.name: prefetchedClass
members.description: A class to apply to links that have been prefetched.

members.name: external
members.description: Forces the link to be considered as external (true) or internal (false). This is helpful to handle edge-cases

members.name: ariaCurrentValue
members.description: Value passed to the attribute `aria-current` when the link is exact active.

members.name: viewTransition
members.description: Pass the returned promise of `router.push()` to `document.startViewTransition()` if supported.

members.name: target
members.description: Where to display the linked URL, as the name for a browsing context.

members.name: rel
members.description: A rel attribute value to apply on the link. Defaults to "noopener noreferrer" for external links.

members.name: noRel
members.description: If set to true, no rel attribute will be added to the link

members.name: prefetch
members.description: When enabled will prefetch middleware, layouts and payloads of links in the viewport.

members.name: prefetchOn
members.description: Allows controlling when to prefetch links. By default, prefetch is triggered only on visibility.

members.name: noPrefetch
members.description: Escape hatch to disable `prefetch` attribute.

members.name: trailingSlash
members.description:
An option to either add or remove trailing slashes in the `href` for this specific link.
Overrides the global `trailingSlash` option if provided.

members.name: triggerProps
members.description: Props forwarded to the trigger element.

members.name: disableOutsidePointerEvents
members.description:
When `true`, hover/focus/click interactions will be disabled on elements outside the `DismissableLayer`. Users will
need to click twice on outside elements to interact with them: once to close the `DismissableLayer`, and again to
trigger the element.

members.name: forceMount
members.description:
Used to force mounting when more control is needed.

Useful when controlling animation with Vue animation libraries.

emits.resolvedType: { "update:modelValue": [value: string]; escapeKeyDown: [event: KeyboardEvent]; pointerDownOutside: [event: PointerDownOutsideEvent]; focusOutside: [event: FocusOutsideEvent]; interactOutside: [event: PointerDownOutsideEvent | FocusOutsideEvent]; select: [payload: CustomEvent<{ originalEvent: Event; }>] }
emits.description: Emits for the navigation menu option component.

callables.name: update:modelValue
callables.description: Emitted when the model value changes.

callables.name: escapeKeyDown
callables.description: Event handler called when the escape key is down. Can be prevented.

referencedTypes.name: KeyboardEvent
referencedTypes.description:
**`KeyboardEvent`** objects describe a user interaction with the keyboard; each event describes a single interaction between the user and a key (or combination of a key with modifier keys) on the keyboard. The event type (keydown, keypress, or keyup) identifies what kind of keyboard activity occurred.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/KeyboardEvent)

callables.name: pointerDownOutside
callables.description: Event handler called when a `pointerdown` event happens outside of the `DismissableLayer`. Can be prevented.

callables.name: focusOutside
callables.description: Event handler called when the focus moves outside of the `DismissableLayer`. Can be prevented.

callables.name: interactOutside
callables.description:
Event handler called when an interaction happens outside the `DismissableLayer`. Specifically, when a `pointerdown`
event happens outside or focus moves outside of it. Can be prevented.

callables.name: select
callables.description: Emitted when select occurs.

props.name: NavigationMenuRootProps
props.resolvedType: { modelValue?: string; defaultValue?: string; dir?: Direction; orientation?: DataOrientation; delayDuration?: number; skipDelayDuration?: number; disableClickTrigger?: boolean; disableHoverTrigger?: boolean; disablePointerLeaveClose?: boolean; unmountOnHide?: boolean }
props.description: Props for the navigation menu root component.

members.name: modelValue
members.description: The controlled value of the menu item to activate. Can be used as `v-model`.

members.name: defaultValue
members.description:
The value of the menu item that should be active when initially rendered.

Use when you do not need to control the value state.

members.name: dir
members.description:
The reading direction of the combobox when applicable.

If omitted, inherits globally from `ConfigProvider` or assumes LTR (left-to-right) reading mode.

members.name: orientation
members.description: The orientation of the menu.

members.name: delayDuration
members.description: The duration from when the pointer enters the trigger until the tooltip gets opened.

members.name: skipDelayDuration
members.description: How much time a user has to enter another trigger without incurring a delay again.

members.name: disableClickTrigger
members.description: If `true`, menu cannot be open by click on trigger

members.name: disableHoverTrigger
members.description: If `true`, menu cannot be open by hover on trigger

members.name: disablePointerLeaveClose
members.description: If `true`, menu will not close during pointer leave event

members.name: unmountOnHide
members.description: When `true`, the element will be unmounted on closed state.

emits.name: NavigationMenuRootEmits
emits.description: Emits for the navigation menu root component.

callables.name: update:modelValue
callables.description: Emitted when the model value changes.
